privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy informs you about the nature, scope and purpose of the processing of personal data within our online services and the associated websites, functions and content.

principles.title: 2. Principles of Data Processing
principles.text: We process personal data according to the following principles:

items.lawfulness: Lawfulness: Processing in accordance with legal regulations
items.purpose: Purpose limitation: Data only for specified purposes
items.minimization: Data minimization: Collection limited to the necessary minimum
items.storage: Storage limitation: Data stored only for a limited time
items.integrity: Integrity and confidentiality: Protection of data

legalBasis.title: 5. Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.text: Your data is processed on the following legal bases:

thirdParties.title: 6. Data Sharing with Third Parties
thirdParties.text: Your data will only be shared:

items.hosting: With service providers for hosting and maintenance
items.business: In case of company sale or restructuring

thirdParties.note: All service providers are subject to strict contractual data protection obligations.

international.title: 7. International Data Transfers
international.text: Your data is generally processed within the EU/EEA. If data is processed outside this area, this will only occur:

items.adequacy: According to an adequacy decision of the EU Commission
items.guarantees: With appropriate safeguards (e.g. Standard Contractual Clauses)

security.title: 8. Data Security
security.text: We implement comprehensive technical and organizational measures:
security.note: Our servers are located in ISO 27001 certified data centers in Germany.

storage.title: 9. Data Retention
storage.text: Personal data is only stored as long as necessary:

items.account: Account data: Until cancellation plus 3 years
items.analytics: Analytics data: 90 days after contract termination

rights.title: 10. Your Rights
rights.text: According to the GDPR, you have the following rights:

items.information: Right of access: Obtain information about stored data
items.correction: Right to rectification: Correct inaccurate data
items.deletion: Right to erasure: Request deletion of data ('right to be forgotten')
items.objection: Right to object: Object to processing
items.portability: Right to data portability: Receive data in structured format
items.complaint: Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority

cookies.title: 11. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.text: We use the following types of cookies:

contact.title: 12. Contact
contact.text: If you have questions regarding data protection, please contact us:

authority.title: Supervisory Authority
authority.name: Berlin Commissioner for Data Protection and Freedom of Information
